title: aesculus × carnea f. briotii
intro: Aesculus × carnea f. briotii, also known as the Rose-Bristled Horse Chestnut or Red Bristle Buckeye, is a hybrid plant species within the Aesculus genus. This plant is primarily known for its medicinal properties, including the presence of aescin, a saponin compound that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aesculus × carnea f. briotii include reducing swelling and pain in the legs, improving circulation, and supporting the health of the cardiovascular system. Aesculus × carnea f. briotii is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
